pillars.title: Tactical Cyberspace
pillars.desc: Backing post-quantum cryptographic machinery, decentralized industrial protocols, and zero-trust firmware networks to protect sovereign infrastructure.

pillars.title: Precision Micro-Hardware
pillars.desc: Funding the next leap in fabrication, sub-nanometer optoelectronics lithography, automated feedback control loops and custom chipsets.

pillars.title: Extreme Environment Robotics
pillars.desc: Supporting physical autonomous machines conducting orbital telemetry mapping, deep-seabed installations, and GPS-denied hydraulic mining operations.
